//: Content-launch scripts to MERGE into your project's package.json `scripts` block. The kit has no package.json (it's a template); bootstrap-project copies these three keys into the project's own package.json. `gate` is the hard SEO/AEO/red-team gate; `deploy` runs the gate before shipping so a failing page BLOCKS the deploy.
//deps: Requires devDependency `sharp` for scripts/gen-image.mjs (fal.ai image step). seo-audit.mjs, validate-build.mjs, and redteam-check.mjs use only Node builtins.
//gate: redteam-check.mjs enforces docs/RED-TEAM-SOP.md: a guide can't deploy unless its current content hash has a recorded PASS in the red-team ledger. No-op until the project has guides.

scripts.gate: astro build && node scripts/seo-audit.mjs && node scripts/validate-build.mjs && node scripts/redteam-check.mjs
